ULF-Synth
  • Enhancement

Enhancement

The enhancement module restores ULF volumes using a pretrained nnUNet-based translation model trained with the ULF-Synth simulation pipeline (synthetic paired data).

Usage

from ulfsynth.enhance import enhance_file, enhance_folder

# Single file (CPU)
enhance_file("ulf_scan.nii.gz", "enhanced.nii.gz", device="cpu")

# Batch folder (GPU)
enhance_folder("ulf_scans/", "enhanced_scans/", device="cuda")

How it works

  1. Weight download — on first call, pretrained model weights are downloaded from HuggingFace and cached at ~/.cache/ulfsynth/.

  2. nnUNet fork — a custom nnUNetv2 fork with the MRCT k-space trainer is bundled inside the package and loaded directly from the vendored source.

  3. Inference — the pretrained model runs sliding-window prediction with the appropriate reconstruction mode (mean aggregation).

Device selection

enhance_file("input.nii.gz", "output.nii.gz", device="cuda")   # GPU
enhance_file("input.nii.gz", "output.nii.gz", device="cpu")    # CPU
enhance_file("input.nii.gz", "output.nii.gz", device="mps")    # Apple Silicon

Weights and intermediate tensors are kept on the selected device (perform_everything_on_device=True).
